# Z00Z Deep Wiki

> Source-cited wiki for the Z00Z Rust workspace covering protocol objects, wallet state, settlement storage, runtime publication, simulator evidence, transport seams, and onboarding material for multiple audiences.

The most important architectural fact is that ownership is split by crate rather than hidden behind one service shell. `z00z_core` owns protocol semantics, `z00z_storage` owns settlement truth, `z00z_wallets` owns user-facing typed inventory, runtime crates own planning and verdict flow, and the simulator stays a harness instead of a second business owner.

## Onboarding

- [Onboarding Hub](./onboarding/index.md): Choose the right reading path for contributors, staff engineers, executives, or product managers.
- [Contributor Guide](./onboarding/contributor-guide.md): Setup, Rust workspace orientation, object model basics, and contribution workflow.
- [Staff Engineer Guide](./onboarding/staff-engineer-guide.md): Ownership-first architecture reading guide with invariants, abstractions, and debt signals.
- [Executive Guide](./onboarding/executive-guide.md): Capability map, scaling pressure, seam risk, and next-quarter recommendations.
- [Product Manager Guide](./onboarding/product-manager-guide.md): User-facing feature map, limitations, and privacy/evidence expectations.

## Architecture

- [System Overview](./02-architecture/system-overview.md): Layered view of protocol, wallet, storage, runtime, rollup, and simulator composition.
- [Crate Boundaries](./02-architecture/crate-boundaries.md): Ownership and exclusion rules that keep crates from drifting into second authorities.

## Getting Started

- [Workspace Overview](./01-getting-started/workspace-overview.md): Why the repository is a Cargo workspace and how the crate families are organized.
- [Setup And Verify](./01-getting-started/setup-and-verify.md): Canonical commands for format, lint, test, and release-style verification.
- [Workspace Map](./01-getting-started/workspace-map.md): Crate-by-crate inventory and routing guide for new changes.

## Deep Dive

- [Object Model And Genesis](./03-core-protocol/object-model-and-genesis.md): Bootstrap authority, typed config, voucher bootstrap semantics, and settlement manifest export.
- [Wallet Architecture](./04-wallet-and-rpc/wallet-architecture.md): Typed object inventory, stable wallet facades, and JSON-RPC registration boundaries.
- [Settlement Runtime And Rollup](./05-storage-runtime/settlement-runtime-and-rollup.md): Storage-owned settlement truth and how runtime, validators, watchers, and rollup verification compose it.
- [Scenario Pipeline](./06-simulator-and-quality/scenario-pipeline.md): Canonical scenario harness, public artifact set, and release-evidence role.
- [Networking And Telemetry](./07-networking-and-observability/networking-and-telemetry.md): Transport-only RPC, OnionNet placeholder seam, watchers, and telemetry surfaces.

## Optional

- [Project Landing Page](./index.md): Developer-facing entry page with quick-start commands and document map.
